bearishPoints: Holder quality is weak; weak/toxic holders may dominate analyzed ownership.
Good-or-better ownership is too small compared to weak/toxic ownership.
thesis.finalInterpretation: Current evidence is mixed; the token needs cleaner holder quality, structure, or risk data before conviction is strong.

holderCompositionThesis.summary: Weak holder composition; weak/toxic holders outweigh strong ownership.
keyPoints: 1.76% of analyzed ownership is held by good-or-better Wallet Alpha V3 holders.
30.33% of analyzed ownership is held by weak/toxic Wallet Alpha V3 holders.
Strong wallets exist, but their analyzed ownership share is too small to dominate the holder base.
Confidence is limited by wallet history depth, holder coverage, or failed wallet analyses.

explanations: Wallet Alpha V3.2 uses DEX quality-calibrated historical Entry/Exit V3 across all covered traded tokens.

Exit quality is strong because covered exits captured meaningful realized upside.
Confidence is medium because 44 covered trades across 10 token(s) were analyzed.
